title: did:web DID document missing Ed25519 recovery key verification method (diverges from gaja)
description:
smallhold's did_web_document() takes a recovery_pubkey parameter and includes an Ed25519VerificationKey2020 as a second verification method in the DID document (src/did.rs:68-117). The upstream gaja version (gaja/src/did.rs:69-103) does NOT include the recovery key in the DID document — it only has the RSA verification method.

This is an INTENTIONAL divergence — smallhold extended the DID document beyond the gaja port. However, note:

1. The @context URI 'https://w3id.org/security/suites/ed2020/v1' (did.rs:87) is WRONG. The correct URI is 'https://w3id.org/security/suites/ed25519-2020/v1'. This will cause JSON-LD processors to fail to resolve the Ed25519VerificationKey2020 type.

2. The Ed25519 recovery key is published in the DID document with its full public key (publicKeyMultibase), which is correct — this is the public key only, not the private key.

Affected: src/did.rs:87 — wrong context URI
close_reason: False finding: Ed25519 recovery key IS included in the DID document
